---
title: "credMortality manuscript report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    df_print: paged
params:
  figures_dir: "figures"
  output_dir: "output"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6,
  out.width = "100%"
)

library(knitr)
library(data.table)

`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

has_targets <- requireNamespace("targets", quietly = TRUE)

safe_tar_names <- function() {
  if (!has_targets) {
    return(character())
  }

  tryCatch(
    targets::tar_meta(fields = "name")$name,
    error = function(e) character()
  )
}

pipeline_targets <- safe_tar_names()

safe_tar_read <- function(name) {
  if (!has_targets || !(name %in% pipeline_targets)) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  tryCatch(
    eval(bquote(targets::tar_read(.(as.name(name))))),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

resolve_file <- function(target = NULL, path = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(target)) {
    x <- safe_tar_read(target)
    if (is.character(x) && length(x) == 1 && file.exists(x)) {
      return(x)
    }
  }

  if (!is.null(path) && file.exists(path)) {
    return(path)
  }

  NULL
}

file_status <- function(target = NULL, path = NULL) {
  out <- resolve_file(target = target, path = path)
  if (is.null(out)) "missing" else "available"
}

show_pdf <- function(path, height = 550) {
  if (is.null(path)) {
    cat("*Not available in the current working tree.*\n")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  if (knitr::is_html_output()) {
    html <- sprintf(
      paste0(
        "<object data='%s' type='application/pdf' width='100%%' height='%spx'>",
        "<p><a href='%s'>Open %s</a></p>",
        "</object>"
      ),
      path,
      height,
      path,
      basename(path)
    )
    return(knitr::asis_output(html))
  }

  knitr::include_graphics(path)
}

show_file_note <- function(target = NULL, path = NULL, note = NULL) {
  out <- resolve_file(target = target, path = path)
  if (is.null(out)) {
    cat("Status: missing\n\n")
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("File: `%s`\n\n", out))
  }
  if (!is.null(note)) {
    cat(note)
    cat("\n")
  }
}

build_mapping <- function(manuscript_location,
                          manuscript_item,
                          target = NA_character_,
                          path = NA_character_,
                          note = NA_character_) {
  data.table(
    manuscript_location = manuscript_location,
    manuscript_item = manuscript_item,
    target = target,
    path = path,
    status = file_status(
      target = if (is.na(target)) NULL else target,
      path = if (is.na(path)) NULL else path
    ),
    note = note
  )
}

mapping_dt <- rbindlist(list(
  build_mapping("Section 4.3.1 / Figure 2a", "Estimated sub-population effects", "fig2a_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_allthetas_zs.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.3.1 / Figure 2b", "Estimated variances", "fig2b_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_variances.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.3.1 / Figure 2c", "Credibility weights", "fig2c_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_simulation_zs.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.3.1 / Figure 2d", "Log mortality by age", "fig2d_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_log_mortality_rates.pdf")),

  build_mapping("Section 4.3.2 / Figure 3a", "Sub-population 1, age 15", "additional_analysis_2_15_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an215.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.3.2 / Figure 3b", "Sub-population 1, age 55", "additional_analysis_2_55_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an255.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.3.2 / Figure 3c", "Sub-population 1, age 80", "additional_analysis_2_80_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an280.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.3.2 / Figure 3d", "Sub-population 2, age 15", "additional_analysis_3_15_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an315.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.3.2 / Figure 3e", "Sub-population 2, age 55", "additional_analysis_3_55_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an355.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.3.2 / Figure 3f", "Sub-population 2, age 80", "additional_analysis_3_80_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an380.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.3.2 / Figure 3g", "Sub-population 3, age 15", "additional_analysis_1_15_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an115.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.3.2 / Figure 3h", "Sub-population 3, age 55", "additional_analysis_1_55_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an155.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.3.2 / Figure 3i", "Sub-population 3, age 80", "additional_analysis_1_80_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an180.pdf")),

  build_mapping("Section 4.3.3 / Figure 4a", "MSEP fan plot, Sub-population 1", "lc_msep_g2_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g2.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.3.3 / Figure 4b", "MSEP fan plot, Sub-population 2", "lc_msep_g3_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g3.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.3.3 / Figure 4c", "MSEP fan plot, Sub-population 3", "lc_msep_g1_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g1.pdf")),

  build_mapping("Section 4.4.2 / Figure 6a", "Rolling-window MSE, Sub-population 1", "lc_mse_group_2_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_2.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.4.2 / Figure 6b", "Rolling-window deviance, Sub-population 1", "lc_deviance_group_2_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_2.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.4.2 / Figure 6c", "Rolling-window MSE, Sub-population 2", "lc_mse_group_3_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_3.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.4.2 / Figure 6d", "Rolling-window deviance, Sub-population 2", "lc_deviance_group_3_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_3.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.4.2 / Figure 6e", "Rolling-window MSE, Sub-population 3", "lc_mse_group_1_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_1.pdf")),
  build_mapping("Section 4.4.2 / Figure 6f", "Rolling-window deviance, Sub-population 3", "lc_deviance_group_1_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_1.pdf")),

  build_mapping("Appendix B.3 / Figure 7a", "Mortality-trend panel (left panel only)", "fig6_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "mortality_rates_simulation.pdf"), "The right panel of Figure 7 is a manuscript-side Lexis diagram and is not generated by the R pipeline."),

  build_mapping("Appendix B.4 / Figure 8a", "Comparable-scale MSEP, Sub-population 1", "lc_msep_g2_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g2_appendix.pdf"), "Listed in the manuscript appendix but not defined in the current `_targets.R`."),
  build_mapping("Appendix B.4 / Figure 8b", "Comparable-scale MSEP, Sub-population 2", "lc_msep_g3_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g3_appendix.pdf"), "Listed in the manuscript appendix but not defined in the current `_targets.R`."),
  build_mapping("Appendix B.4 / Figure 8c", "Comparable-scale MSEP, Sub-population 3", "lc_msep_g1_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g1_appendix.pdf"), "Listed in the manuscript appendix but not defined in the current `_targets.R`."),

  build_mapping("Appendix B.4 / Figure 9a", "Comparable-scale rolling-window MSE, Sub-population 1", "lc_mse_group_2_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_2_app.pdf"), "Listed in the manuscript appendix but not defined in the current `_targets.R`."),
  build_mapping("Appendix B.4 / Figure 9b", "Comparable-scale rolling-window deviance, Sub-population 1", "lc_deviance_group_2_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_2_app.pdf"), "Listed in the manuscript appendix but not defined in the current `_targets.R`."),
  build_mapping("Appendix B.4 / Figure 9c", "Comparable-scale rolling-window MSE, Sub-population 2", "lc_mse_group_3_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_3_app.pdf"), "Listed in the manuscript appendix but not defined in the current `_targets.R`."),
  build_mapping("Appendix B.4 / Figure 9d", "Comparable-scale rolling-window deviance, Sub-population 2", "lc_deviance_group_3_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_3_app.pdf"), "Listed in the manuscript appendix but not defined in the current `_targets.R`."),
  build_mapping("Appendix B.4 / Figure 9e", "Comparable-scale rolling-window MSE, Sub-population 3", "lc_mse_group_1_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_1_app.pdf"), "Listed in the manuscript appendix but not defined in the current `_targets.R`."),
  build_mapping("Appendix B.4 / Figure 9f", "Comparable-scale rolling-window deviance, Sub-population 3", "lc_deviance_group_1_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_1_app.pdf"), "Listed in the manuscript appendix but not defined in the current `_targets.R`."),

  build_mapping("Saved result file", "Rolling-window aggregated results", "sim_age_bracket_results_file", file.path(params$output_dir, "results_age_breakets_smooth.csv")),
  build_mapping("Saved result file", "MSEP study object", "lc_msep_results_file", file.path(params$output_dir, "lc_msep_results.rds")),
  build_mapping("Shipped auxiliary file", "Convergence summary for separate models", NA_character_, file.path(params$output_dir, "convergence_separate_population_models.csv"), "Shipped with the supplement but not regenerated by the current `_targets.R`."),
  build_mapping("Manual manuscript element", "Figure 1, Figure 5, Figure 7b, and Table 1", NA_character_, NA_character_, "These are manuscript-side elements or tables not directly produced by the current R pipeline.")
), fill = TRUE)

results_csv <- resolve_file("sim_age_bracket_results_file", file.path(params$output_dir, "results_age_breakets_smooth.csv"))
msep_rds <- resolve_file("lc_msep_results_file", file.path(params$output_dir, "lc_msep_results.rds"))
conv_csv <- resolve_file(path = file.path(params$output_dir, "convergence_separate_population_models.csv"))

results_dt <- if (!is.null(results_csv)) fread(results_csv) else NULL
msep_obj <- if (!is.null(msep_rds)) readRDS(msep_rds) else NULL
conv_dt <- if (!is.null(conv_csv)) fread(conv_csv) else NULL
```

# Purpose of this report

This report is aligned to the current manuscript structure in the submitted PDF.

It follows the manuscript section-by-section and figure-by-figure, with the code-generated outputs organised under:

- Section 4.3.1 / Figure 2
- Section 4.3.2 / Figure 3
- Section 4.3.3 / Figure 4
- Section 4.4.2 / Figure 6
- Appendix B.3 / Figure 7a
- Appendix B.4 / Figures 8 and 9

The super-population rolling-window MSE and deviance panels are intentionally omitted here because they are no longer part of the current manuscript, even though legacy targets for those files may still exist in `_targets.R`.

For routine replication checks, this file can usually be read directly together with the shipped `figures/`, `output/`, and `_targets/` contents, without deleting the cache and rerunning the full pipeline.

# Manuscript-linked inventory

```{r}
kable(mapping_dt, align = c("l", "l", "l", "l", "l", "l"))
```

```{r}
summary_dt <- mapping_dt[, .(
  n_items = .N,
  n_available = sum(status == "available"),
  n_missing = sum(status == "missing")
), by = manuscript_location]

kable(summary_dt, align = "lrrr")
```

# Section 4.3.1 â€” Figure 2: estimation of components in the credibility model

The manuscript states that Section 4.3.1 discusses the estimated sub-population effects, their estimated variances, the credibility weights, and the resulting age profile of the predicted mortality rates.

## Figure 2a â€” Estimated sub-population effects

```{r}
show_file_note("fig2a_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_allthetas_zs.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("fig2a_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_allthetas_zs.pdf")))
```

## Figure 2b â€” Estimated variances

```{r}
show_file_note("fig2b_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_variances.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("fig2b_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_variances.pdf")))
```

## Figure 2c â€” Credibility weights

```{r}
show_file_note("fig2c_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_simulation_zs.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("fig2c_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_simulation_zs.pdf")))
```

## Figure 2d â€” Log mortality by age

```{r}
show_file_note("fig2d_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_log_mortality_rates.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("fig2d_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_log_mortality_rates.pdf")))
```

# Section 4.3.2 â€” Figure 3: including more calendar years in the data

The manuscript uses Figure 3 to show how the credibility predictor changes as more sample years are added, with rows corresponding to sub-populations 1â€“3 and columns corresponding to ages 15, 55, and 80.

## Sub-population 1

### Figure 3a â€” Age 15

```{r}
show_file_note("additional_analysis_2_15_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an215.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("additional_analysis_2_15_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an215.pdf")), height = 480)
```

### Figure 3b â€” Age 55

```{r}
show_file_note("additional_analysis_2_55_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an255.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("additional_analysis_2_55_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an255.pdf")), height = 480)
```

### Figure 3c â€” Age 80

```{r}
show_file_note("additional_analysis_2_80_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an280.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("additional_analysis_2_80_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an280.pdf")), height = 480)
```

## Sub-population 2

### Figure 3d â€” Age 15

```{r}
show_file_note("additional_analysis_3_15_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an315.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("additional_analysis_3_15_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an315.pdf")), height = 480)
```

### Figure 3e â€” Age 55

```{r}
show_file_note("additional_analysis_3_55_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an355.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("additional_analysis_3_55_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an355.pdf")), height = 480)
```

### Figure 3f â€” Age 80

```{r}
show_file_note("additional_analysis_3_80_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an380.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("additional_analysis_3_80_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an380.pdf")), height = 480)
```

## Sub-population 3

### Figure 3g â€” Age 15

```{r}
show_file_note("additional_analysis_1_15_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an115.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("additional_analysis_1_15_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an115.pdf")), height = 480)
```

### Figure 3h â€” Age 55

```{r}
show_file_note("additional_analysis_1_55_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an155.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("additional_analysis_1_55_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an155.pdf")), height = 480)
```

### Figure 3i â€” Age 80

```{r}
show_file_note("additional_analysis_1_80_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an180.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("additional_analysis_1_80_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "an180.pdf")), height = 480)
```

# Section 4.3.3 â€” Figure 4: mean squared error of prediction

The manuscript uses Figure 4 for the MSEP comparison at age 55 over a five-year horizon, with panels for sub-populations 1â€“3.

## Figure 4a â€” Sub-population 1

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_msep_g2_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g2.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_msep_g2_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g2.pdf")))
```

## Figure 4b â€” Sub-population 2

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_msep_g3_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g3.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_msep_g3_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g3.pdf")))
```

## Figure 4c â€” Sub-population 3

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_msep_g1_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g1.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_msep_g1_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g1.pdf")))
```

# Section 4.4.2 â€” Figure 6: out-of-sample performance across repeated simulations

The current manuscript uses Figure 6 for the rolling-window out-of-sample performance plots. Only the sub-population panels are part of the current manuscript version.

## Sub-population 1

### Figure 6a â€” MSE

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_mse_group_2_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_2.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_mse_group_2_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_2.pdf")))
```

### Figure 6b â€” Deviance

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_deviance_group_2_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_2.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_deviance_group_2_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_2.pdf")))
```

## Sub-population 2

### Figure 6c â€” MSE

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_mse_group_3_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_3.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_mse_group_3_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_3.pdf")))
```

### Figure 6d â€” Deviance

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_deviance_group_3_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_3.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_deviance_group_3_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_3.pdf")))
```

## Sub-population 3

### Figure 6e â€” MSE

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_mse_group_1_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_1.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_mse_group_1_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_1.pdf")))
```

### Figure 6f â€” Deviance

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_deviance_group_1_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_1.pdf"))
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_deviance_group_1_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_1.pdf")))
```

# Appendix B.3 â€” Figure 7

The code supplement only generates the left panel of Figure 7.

## Figure 7a â€” Mortality-trend panel

```{r}
show_file_note(
  "fig6_pdf",
  file.path(params$figures_dir, "mortality_rates_simulation.pdf"),
  note = "This corresponds to Figure 7a in the manuscript. Figure 7b is a manuscript-side Lexis diagram and is not a pipeline output."
)
show_pdf(resolve_file("fig6_pdf", file.path(params$figures_dir, "mortality_rates_simulation.pdf")))
```

# Appendix B.4 â€” Figure 8: Figure 4 on comparable scales

The manuscript appendix reports Figure 8 as the common-scale version of the Figure 4 MSEP fan plots. These appendix files are shown if present. If they are missing, that means they are referenced in the manuscript but are not currently produced by the present `_targets.R`.

## Figure 8a â€” Sub-population 1

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_msep_g2_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g2_appendix.pdf"), note = "Appendix target not currently defined in `_targets.R`.")
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_msep_g2_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g2_appendix.pdf")))
```

## Figure 8b â€” Sub-population 2

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_msep_g3_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g3_appendix.pdf"), note = "Appendix target not currently defined in `_targets.R`.")
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_msep_g3_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g3_appendix.pdf")))
```

## Figure 8c â€” Sub-population 3

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_msep_g1_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g1_appendix.pdf"), note = "Appendix target not currently defined in `_targets.R`.")
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_msep_g1_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_msep_55_g1_appendix.pdf")))
```

# Appendix B.4 â€” Figure 9: Figure 6 on comparable scales

The manuscript appendix reports Figure 9 as the common-scale version of the Figure 6 rolling-window plots. As above, the appendix files are shown if present and otherwise flagged as absent from the current `_targets.R`.

## Sub-population 1

### Figure 9a â€” MSE

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_mse_group_2_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_2_app.pdf"), note = "Appendix target not currently defined in `_targets.R`.")
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_mse_group_2_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_2_app.pdf")))
```

### Figure 9b â€” Deviance

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_deviance_group_2_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_2_app.pdf"), note = "Appendix target not currently defined in `_targets.R`.")
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_deviance_group_2_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_2_app.pdf")))
```

## Sub-population 2

### Figure 9c â€” MSE

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_mse_group_3_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_3_app.pdf"), note = "Appendix target not currently defined in `_targets.R`.")
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_mse_group_3_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_3_app.pdf")))
```

### Figure 9d â€” Deviance

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_deviance_group_3_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_3_app.pdf"), note = "Appendix target not currently defined in `_targets.R`.")
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_deviance_group_3_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_3_app.pdf")))
```

## Sub-population 3

### Figure 9e â€” MSE

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_mse_group_1_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_1_app.pdf"), note = "Appendix target not currently defined in `_targets.R`.")
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_mse_group_1_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_mse_age_classes_group_1_app.pdf")))
```

### Figure 9f â€” Deviance

```{r}
show_file_note("lc_deviance_group_1_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_1_app.pdf"), note = "Appendix target not currently defined in `_targets.R`.")
show_pdf(resolve_file("lc_deviance_group_1_app", file.path(params$figures_dir, "lc_deviance_age_classes_group_1_app.pdf")))
```

# Saved outputs and manuscript table support

## `output/results_age_breakets_smooth.csv`

```{r}
if (is.null(results_dt)) {
  cat("`output/results_age_breakets_smooth.csv` is not available.\n")
} else {
  cat(sprintf("File: `%s`\n\n", results_csv))
  overview <- data.table(
    n_rows = nrow(results_dt),
    n_predictors = uniqueN(results_dt$predictor),
    n_models = uniqueN(results_dt$model),
    n_seeds = uniqueN(results_dt$seed_ix),
    n_rolls = uniqueN(results_dt$years_ix),
    n_age_brackets = uniqueN(results_dt$age_breakets)
  )
  kable(overview)
  kable(head(results_dt, 12))
}
```

## Reconstructing the average BIC values used in Table 1

```{r}
if (is.null(results_dt)) {
  cat("BIC reconstruction is unavailable because `output/results_age_breakets_smooth.csv` is missing.\n")
} else {
  bic_dt <- unique(results_dt[, .(predictor, seed_ix, years_ix, bic)])
  bic_summary <- bic_dt[, .(
    average_bic = mean(bic),
    average_bic_div_1000 = mean(bic) / 1000
  ), by = predictor][order(average_bic)]

  kable(bic_summary)
}
```

## `output/lc_msep_results.rds`

```{r}
if (is.null(msep_obj)) {
  cat("`output/lc_msep_results.rds` is not available.\n")
} else {
  cat(sprintf("File: `%s`\n\n", msep_rds))
  obj_summary <- data.table(
    predictor = msep_obj$predictor %||% NA_character_,
    reference_age = msep_obj$reference_age %||% NA_integer_,
    forecasting_horizon = msep_obj$forecasting_horizon %||% NA_integer_,
    n_groups = length(msep_obj$groups)
  )
  kable(obj_summary)
}
```

## `output/convergence_separate_population_models.csv`

```{r}
if (is.null(conv_dt)) {
  cat("`output/convergence_separate_population_models.csv` is not available.\n")
} else {
  cat(sprintf("File: `%s`\n\n", conv_csv))
  kable(head(conv_dt, 12))
}
```

# Notes

- This report is intentionally manuscript-aligned rather than target-name-aligned.
- Some target names are legacy names from earlier drafting stages. The report keeps the manuscript numbering first and the target names second.
- The super-population rolling-window MSE and deviance files are not displayed here because they are not part of the current manuscript.
- If appendix files for Figures 8 and 9 are later added to the pipeline, this report will display them automatically as long as the file paths match the names used above.
